title: Initial API skeleton + first deploy
author: marcus
body: Stand up the basic FastAPI skeleton, CI workflow, and first staging deploy. Closing the loop on the 'we need a real codebase' epic.

title: GitHub webhook signature verification fails on certain edge cases
author: ravi
body: Some webhooks from GitHub Enterprise Cloud fail signature verification due to JSON canonicalization differences. Repro: payload contains a string field with non-ASCII characters; GitHub serializes it before HMAC, we receive the raw bytes.

title: Switchyard cold-start latency spikes after off-peak
author: ravi
body: First webhook after a quiet hour takes ~3-5s. Pool sizing config issue. Bumping idle keepalive.

title: Add lint workflow that runs Pylon on Pylon's PRs
author: priya
body: Dogfood. We should run our own analyzer against PRs into this repo. Already done out-of-band; this issue tracks formalizing it as a CI workflow.

title: GitHub App reinstall loses webhook subscription
author: bridget
body: Customer-reported. Mirror of PYL-300. Backfill plan needed for the 11 affected orgs.

title: GitLab webhook adapter — design
author: jordan
body: Design doc for normalizing GitLab webhooks into our internal WebhookEvent shape. To be reviewed by Wei + Priya before implementation kicks off in S3.

title: GitLab MR comment poster — implementation
author: jordan
body: Implementation tracker for PYL-207. Discussion comments documenting the discussion → note mapping decision.

title: Webhook signature mismatch on GitLab payloads with trailing newline
author: fatima
body: Customer's GitLab CI tooling adds a trailing newline to webhook payloads. Our HMAC was computing over the trimmed body. Fixed to use the raw bytes as received.

title: Tower cycle-time chart returns 0 for solo-developer repos
author: tom
body: Customer-reported via support. Mirror of PYL-301. Self-reviews were excluded by mistake; cycle-time should reflect them.

title: Add audit_log table — schema review
author: ravi
body: Schema review thread for PYL-217. Append-only enforcement at the Postgres role level (not just app convention). Discussion of indexing for the 12-month query window.

title: Pylon Beacon dogfood: 4 findings on this repo
author: wei
body: Beacon flagged 4 findings on our own repo: 2 print-in-prod (one in main, one in webhook), 1 todo-without-author, 1 bare-mutex. Fixed in #93.

title: FastAPI 0.115 upgrade — Pydantic v2 breakage
author: ravi
body: PYL-400. One Pydantic schema needs `model_validator` rename. Tracking here.

title: Beacon python.bare-except false positives on test fixtures
author: fatima
body: Arcola Studios reports the rule fires on intentional bare-except in test fixtures. PYL-302. Default scoping now excludes test paths.

title: Marketplace data model — review thread
author: hugo
body: PYL-200. Schema review. JSONB vs text for rule content (decided JSONB). Soft delete vs hard delete (decided soft). Migration timing.

title: Audit log UI — design questions
author: camille
body: Should the diff render inline or behind a click? Decision: inline if <5 lines, click-to-expand otherwise. Most customers scan visually.

title: Async-correctness rule pack — PYL-104 prep
author: hugo
body: Customer pain log surveyed: 32% of postmortems involve async-correctness. Top 30 patterns documented. Spec ready for review by Wei + Priya.

title: Tower team-comparison API — design
author: camille
body: PYL-213. Denormalized read model in ClickHouse. Live multi-team queries are too slow. Approved.

title: Marketplace publishing — Safari description bug
author: tom
body: Customer reports the description field clears on first keystroke after pasting. Safari 17.x only. PYL-304. TanStack Form's input event handling.

title: Audit log >100k rows query timeout
author: fatima
body: Stratosphere Robotics enterprise customer. 30s timeout on 12-month filter, ~150k rows. Index added; page-query capped at 30 days; longer windows go through export.

title: GitLab MR analyzer pipeline integration
author: jordan
body: PYL-209. P95 latency 78s on staging, comfortable margin.

title: Marketplace browse UI — density question
author: felix
body: Should the browse page be dense (5-column) or breathable (3-column)? Aligned on dense. Marketplace will only feel useful with critical mass; density makes early state feel populated.

title: Pylon Suggest grounding research output
author: wei
body: PYL-500 spike output. ~60 of 280 default rules are mechanically suggestable; ~80 conditionally; ~140 not suggestable in any meaningful way without dialogue. Doc internal only.

title: Java static-analysis library survey (PYL-501)
author: wei
body: Survey output: SpotBugs, Error Prone, PMD, Checker Framework, Sonar's Java analyzer. None has the rule-customization story we need. Recommendation: hire (don't acquire). OQ-5 resolved.

title: GitLab merge-block enforcer — audit log integration question
author: jordan
body: Should override events (project owner unblocks failed Pylon status check) get logged in audit_log? Decision: yes, would be a SOC 2 finding otherwise.

title: First 10 async rules — shadow-mode FP rate report
author: hugo
body: PYL-222. Shadow-mode results across 30 days of customer PRs: 6.4% aggregate FP rate. Below 8% threshold. Promoting to default-on.

title: Verdant Energy GitLab pilot — duplicate comment bug
author: tom
body: PYL-305. Pilot customer Verdant Energy reported duplicate Pylon comments on MR retry. Idempotency layer added; fix in PR review.

title: GitHub App webhook signature failure (P1)
author: ravi
body: Production incident. PYL-306. GitHub rotated their App signing key per 90-day policy; we had hardcoded the previous key. ~40% of webhooks failed verification 2026-04-22 03:00–04:30 UTC. Manual rotation done; auto-rotate via JWKS in PR review.

title: Beacon rule-conflict detector — design draft
author: hugo
body: PYL-502 spike. Design draft circulated; conflict detection is more subtle than expected — rules can be partially overlapping. Iterating with Wei.

title: Tower team comparison — SAML group resolution
author: camille
body: PYL-215. SAML group resolution is the long pole for the GA. Targeting EOS14 still feasible but tight.

title: Auto-rotate webhook keys — implementation tracking
author: ravi
body: PYL-306 fix. Will use api.github.com/meta/public-keys (verifying exact path). 12h refresh cycle. PR up.

title: Reviewer fatigue check — Pylon dogfood retrospective
author: esther
body: Esther doing a small retrospective on Pylon-on-Pylon: how often do reviewers act on Pylon's findings vs. dismiss them on this repo? Goal: surface our own team's signal-to-noise tax. Output: blog post draft.

title: Async rule pack — next 20 rules — gather/wait/timeout
author: hugo
body: PYL-223. 13/20 merged. Last 7 in flight. asyncio.Lock patterns moved to follow-up — they need control-flow analysis the simpler tree-sitter queries can't handle.

title: Tower data export API — REST vs GraphQL design call
author: camille
body: Q3 commit. OQ-2 in the Master PRD. Design call scheduled for next week.

title: GitLab GA documentation — docs.pylon.dev/gitlab
author: esther
body: PYL-211. Mirroring GitHub doc structure with platform-difference callouts.

title: Onboarding redesign — time-to-first-comment investigation
author: felix
body: Q4 prep. Current TTFC is 22 minutes. Target 15. Felix + Tomás investigating where the time goes.

title: Beacon: 30 new Python rules — backlog tracking
author: wei
body: Q2 commit. Tracker for the 30-rule batch. Each rule landing as its own PR; backlog of which patterns are coming next.

title: Pylon Suggest UX spec
author: wei
body: PYL-105. Felix + Wei collaborating on how suggestions surface in PR comments without overwhelming reviewers. Draft circulating.

title: Switchyard latency regression — investigate
author: ravi
body: Datadog showing p95 webhook latency creep from 950ms to 1180ms over the past 2 weeks. Not yet over our SLO but trend is bad. Investigation underway.

title: Marketplace v0.2 retrospective — first month
author: wei
body: 30 days post-launch retrospective. 23 rules published in first 4 days; 41 by end of week 2; current 67. Subscriber count modest but growing. Key open question: do we ship rule packs as v0.2 or hold for further preview?

title: Postgres connection pool sizing
author: ravi
body: Pool getting saturated during webhook bursts. Bumping max_connections; watching for downstream effect.

title: Verdant Energy contract — engineering inputs
author: dave
body: Sales needs technical inputs for the Verdant Enterprise contract. SLA commitments, single-tenant deployment option questions. Jordan to provide by 2026-04-25.

title: Reviewer-side suppression annotation expansion
author: wei
body: Customers asking for richer suppression annotations: not just `# pylon: suppress(rule-id) — reason` but per-block, per-function. Backlog for Q3 scoping.

title: Audit log retention enforcement — automated cleanup
author: tomas
body: Need automated cleanup respecting tier retention (1y Business / 7y Enterprise). Currently retention is enforced at query time, not by deleting old rows. Storage growing.

title: Beacon rule documentation generator
author: esther
body: Auto-generate the per-rule docs page from rule metadata + test corpus examples. Currently each rule's docs are hand-written; falling behind. POC sprint.

title: Webhook replay tool for incident recovery
author: ravi
body: After PYL-306, we manually replayed failed webhooks. Want a tool that automates this for the next inevitable issue. CLI + dashboard hook.

title: GitLab self-hosted Enterprise — feasibility scoping
author: jordan
body: Olivia asked for late-2026 scoping. OQ-3 in Master PRD. Jordan to scope after GitLab Cloud GA ships.

title: Add pyproject Beacon-rule auto-gen on rule registry change
author: hugo
body: Today, registering a new rule means editing analyzer.py manually. Idea: auto-generate _RULES dict from a directory scan + decorator. Trade-off: explicit registry has audit clarity. Discussion open.

title: Tower caching layer — consistency edge cases
author: camille
body: Tower's Redis cache occasionally serves stale aggregates if a writer/reader split happens during ingest. Edge case but worth fixing as we scale.

title: CI flakiness — pgvector migration tests
author: ravi
body: pgvector migration tests flake on cold cache (~5% rate). Investigating; might be a timing assumption in the migration script.

title: Beacon rule packs v1 design
author: wei
body: Currently marketplace publishes single rules. Customers asking for rule packs (related rules bundled with a config). Design discussion — pack-level versioning is the gnarly piece.
